content.status: Open to opportunities · Growth · BizOps · AI Ops
content.ai_h: Ask my AI anything about my experience.
content.ai_tag: This portfolio has a built-in AI assistant trained on my resume. Get straight answers about my work, impact, and skills — before we even talk.
content.ai_hello: Hi! I'm Teguh's AI assistant, and I know his resume inside out. Ask me about his experience, impact, projects, or how he works with AI. 👋
content.ai_ph: Type your question…  e.g. What are his biggest achievements?
content.hero_h1: Growth & Business Operations generalist who builds with AI.
content.bio: Built a Customer Experience function from the ground up at a B2B SaaS, led CS teams across regional e-commerce (Lazada PH, Temu EU), and run operations across tooling, data, and AI. I think in CSAT, churn, retention, and adoption — then build the dashboards and AI agents that move them, learning and shipping with AI every day.

exp.d: Rebuilt the CX function end-to-end; ran the CSAT dashboard & weekly reporting (97.9% CSAT, 82.4% ISS); led HRIS implementation across 300+ companies / 6,000+ headcount with <15-day time-to-value & 100% retention; owned prompt engineering & deployment of the KIRA AI agent.
Led 15 agents to 71.85% CSAT; daily coaching & calibration. Fast-tracked from SME to Team Leader in 2 months.
Handled complex Tier 2 escalations; authored documentation that cut Tier 2 escalation volume by 82%. Promoted Tier 1 → Tier 2 in 1 month.

cert: Alibaba Cloud Academy — Big Data Certified (2024)
DBS Foundation Coding Camp — ML Developer (2024)
Indosat IOH ID.CAMP — Data Scientist Program (2023)

beyond.d: Daily AI use, prompt engineering & agent building as a long-term focus.
Ships dashboards & internal tools with AI — no formal dev background.
Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Deepseek, Ollama, Groq.

content.cta_p: Open to Growth, BizOps & AI-focused roles.
